pagetext.p: If you cloned the repository at SF you should have a copy of Rivetweb's pages in the directory 'website'. You may check out basic Rivetweb functionalities having this website working on your own Apache installation.
Open Apache's configuration file and create this stanza of Rivet directives
pagetext.programlisting: RivetServerConf ChildInitScript \ "namespace eval ::rivetweb { set rivetweb_root <path to rivetweb root> }" RivetServerConf ChildInitScript "cd <path to the website root directory>" RivetServerConf ChildInitScript "source init.tcl" RivetServerConf BeforeScript "source before.tcl"
